title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Program (SIP) for Cy 2021 of All Departments / Units for the Payment of Hazard Pay in the Amount of Six Million Sixteen Thousand Six Hundred Fifty Pesos and 00/100 (P 6,016,650.00) Chargeable Against Ps Savings for Cy 2021 and Various Expenses for General Services Office GSO) in the Amount of Three Million One Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P 3,100,000.00) and for Commission on Audit (COA) in the Amount of One Hundred Fifty Thousand Peso
